channel.title: debian on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in debian on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: Debian or Ubuntu Chinese Language Support
item.description: Ubuntu Chinese Language Support 编辑/etc/environment如下: vi /etc/environment 添加如下: LC_ALL="en_US.UTF-8" LANG="zh_CN.UTF-8" UNZIP='-O CP936" ZIPINFO="-O CP936" 重新生成语言设置 sudo locale-gen en_US en_US.UTF-8 zh_CN zh_CN.UTF-8 sudo dpkg-reconfigure locales 中文支持 vim中文支持 编辑~/

item.title: How to nstall ProxmoxVE 5.x on Debian 9
item.description: Install Proxmox VE 5.x on Debian 9 Chang IP ADDRESS vi /etc/network/interfaces # This file describes the network interfaces available on your system # and how to activate them. For more information, see interfaces(5). source /etc/network/interfaces.d/* # The loopback network interface auto lo iface lo inet loopback # The primary network interface #allow-hotplug eno1 auto eno1 #iface eno1 inet dhcp iface eno1 inet static address *.*.*.* netmask *.*.*.* gateway *.

item.title: How to Remove LC_CTYPE Error
item.description: apt-get autoremove export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 echo "en_US.UTF-8 UTF-8" >> /etc/locale.gen locale-gen
